summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM Carfax Manual Flow, authentication with daily session reset, and staff sessions management. All core features are working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/carfax/request - Create new carfax request - ✅ Working
GET /api/carfax/me - Get user's carfax requests - ✅ Working
Auth login creates session properly - ✅ Working
/admin/carfax page loads with analytics cards and queue - ✅ Working
/cabinet/carfax page loads with stats and 'Створити запит' button - ✅ Working
Carfax workflow: pending → processing → uploaded - ✅ Working
Cache hit logic for duplicate VINs - ✅ Working
Manager daily session reset functionality - ✅ Working
Staff sessions monitoring with suspicious activity detection - ✅ Working
